candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, but not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total unless nothing else exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at period end
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash can reconcile to balance sheet cash, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.
Cash component only, not necessarily total cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet line as requested.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred when explicit total exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean reported total for short-term debt/current financing liabilities; lease liabilities are shown separately, so this likely excludes leases in line with baseline.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but may be only a component of total current interest-bearing debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt excluding Capital Leases
candidates.why: Semantically very close to STD, but appears unavailable/blank in preview and may not be the main reported current debt total.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt excluding Capital Leases

variables.notes: Chose a clean current debt total and excluded lease liabilities. Did not add 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Contains tax-related obligations but not specifically income taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is the clear balance-sheet tax payable/current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Explicit total net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related asset component, not total PPE and not preferred.
Capital expenditure flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected an exact total/net PPE line outside the shortlist; confident this is the correct PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.
Operating cash before interest/tax and thus not the final net operating cash flow when a better line exists.
Other/balancing style line, not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Used the exact net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
